goal: create a script or system that gets a summary of my twitter list and sends it to my gmail every hour

unresolvedBlocking.description: Twitter API v2 does not support server-side time filtering for lists, requiring client-side filtering of tweets older than 1 hour. This introduces a risk of missing tweets near hour boundaries if API pagination is slow.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Implement client-side time filtering with a 2-minute buffer window and retry logic for partial failures.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Lambda timeout (1 minute) may be insufficient for large lists (>100 tweets/hour) due to pagination delays, risking incomplete summaries and silent failures.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Increase timeout to 5 minutes and implement early exit after 100 tweets (API max per request).

unresolvedBlocking.description: Gmail API quota exhaustion (daily limit) could prevent email delivery if multiple summaries fail consecutively, leading to silent failures.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Add quota monitoring and implement exponential backoff with 24-hour retry window.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Time zone confusion in summary timestamps (UTC vs. user expectation) may cause user confusion and reduce trust in the system.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Standardize all timestamps to UTC in the summary header and add a `TIMEZONE` environment variable for local display.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Service account OAuth for Gmail may fail if the user's account has 2FA enabled, blocking email delivery.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Implement fallback to App Password for personal Gmail accounts and document the requirement.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Missing error handling for Twitter API rate limits (429 responses) could cause silent failures without alerting.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Add retry logic with exponential backoff (max 3 attempts) and CloudWatch alerts for 429 errors.

unresolvedBlocking.description: No mechanism to handle Twitter API changes (e.g., endpoint deprecation) could break the system without warning.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Implement API version pinning and quarterly changelog monitoring with fallback to v1.1 if needed.

unresolvedBlocking.description: Lack of email deliverability monitoring (e.g., Gmail spam folder checks) risks undetected delivery failures.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Add email deliverability monitoring via Gmail API's `message_id` and alert on spam folder placement.

unresolvedBlocking.description: No backup plan for Twitter API failures (e.g., downtime) could result in no summary being sent during outages.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Implement a fallback to a cached summary or manual notification during extended Twitter API downtime.

unresolvedBlocking.description: No validation of Twitter List ID format or existence before execution could cause silent failures.
unresolvedBlocking.fix: Add pre-execution validation of `TWITTER_LIST_ID` format and existence via Twitter API.
